angles.hook: What if your next ad campaign took 5 minutes instead of 5 days?
angles.value_proposition: Nike automates your entire ad creation pipeline — from strategy to finished video.

angles.hook: Stop paying agencies $10K for ads you can make yourself.
angles.value_proposition: Nike gives founders agency-quality creatives at a fraction of the cost.

angles.hook: Your clients want 10 ad variants by tomorrow. Here's how.
angles.value_proposition: With Nike, create multiple ad variants in minutes and impress every client.
